meta.name: Little Buddy Sprite Preset
meta.lora_note: ComfyUI-Direct name (suffixed with _00001_). SwarmUI's WebAPI /API/GenerateText2Image LoRAs[] index does NOT know this LoRA (documented index-mismatch). ALWAYS load via ComfyUI LoraLoader node, never via SwarmUI WebAPI LoRAs[].
meta.character_type: 32x32 chibi creature (NOT a girl/character — old 'katharina character' triggers are wrong for this LoRA)

generation.post_process: nearest_neighbor_downscale_to_64 (post-gen; SDXL native res 512, then NN-shrink to 64x64, never bilinear)

prompt_templates.positive_base: pixel art, littlebuddy, 32x32 chibi creature, white background, masterpiece, highly detailed, sharp pixels, no smoothing, {pose}
prompt_templates.negative: blurry, smoothed, anti-aliased, gradients, muted, dull, hazy, muddy colors, deformed, noise, borders, frame, watermark, text, signature, multiple characters, extra limbs, human, realistic, photo, 3d, grass, ground, outdoor, landscape, scenery, green shadow, colored shadow, fantasy, wings, halo, tail, animal ears, cat ears

pose_templates.idle: standing, idle pose, both feet planted, neutral expression
pose_templates.happy: happy expression, small smile, slight bounce
pose_templates.sleepy: sleepy expression, eyes half closed, slight sway
pose_templates.thirsty: thirsty expression, looking up, tongue slightly out
pose_templates.hungry: hungry expression, looking at viewer, eager
pose_templates.playful: playful expression, one paw up, wagging
pose_templates.walking: walking forward, one foot in front of the other, mid-step
